address: Khok Tum area, Mueang Lopburi District, Lopburi
opening_hours: Seasonal outdoor site; confirm bloom and local access before visiting

description.en: The strongest seasonal contrast to Lopburi's historic core when bloom timing is right.
description.nl: Het sterkste seizoenscontrast met de historische kern van Lopburi wanneer de bloei goed valt.

metaTitle.en: Khao Chin Lae Sunflower Field | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Khao Chin Lae Sunflower Field | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Why Khao Chin Lae works as Lopburi's best seasonal landscape detour and when it is worth adding to the trip.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom Khao Chin Lae werkt als de beste seizoensmatige landschapsdetour van Lopburi en wanneer die de trip echt waard is.

enhanced_description:
Khao Chin Lae is the seasonal detour that most clearly justifies leaving Lopburi's old city behind for a short landscape break. It works because the contrast is sharp: after palace walls, Khmer ruins, and monkey-zone streets, the open field setting makes the trip feel broader without needing a full separate province transfer.

That said, this is not a permanent all-season anchor. Official TAT Newsroom coverage still frames Khao Chin Lae as the province's leading sunflower-field draw in the cooler months, which is helpful because it reinforces the most practical truth about the stop: it is excellent when timing is right and not worth forcing when blooms are weak or the season is wrong.
detailed_history: TAT Newsroom continues to identify Khao Chin Lae as the biggest and most popular sunflower-field area in Lopburi during the cool-season bloom window. That makes it the strongest scenic add-on to a short city stay, but only when you verify conditions first.
visitor_experience: Expect a targeted landscape stop rather than a full-day attraction. It works best as one photographic and scenic block added to a monument-led trip, not as a substitute for the old city itself.

best_time_to_visit.crowd_level: Can be busy during the peak bloom window

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Use a car or driver from Lopburi; this is not part of the compact walking core.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: Seasonal countryside routes and the wider Khok Tum side.
practical_info.food_options: Eat before or after the field stop rather than relying on it for the day's main meal.

insider_tips: Do not assume the fields are at peak bloom without checking first.
Use this as one cool-season add-on, not as the centerpiece of a year-round Lopburi trip.
Morning gives the clearest light and the lowest heat.
verified_note: Source-backed summary based on current official TAT Newsroom framing for Lopburi's sunflower season. Bloom timing, access, and local setup remain seasonal variables.
cultural_significance: Khao Chin Lae adds the most recognizable cool-season landscape contrast to Lopburi's otherwise monument-heavy travel identity.

contentSources.name: Wonders of Lop Buri combine Thai history, sunflowers and natural attractions
